title: The Stumbling Goblin
synopsis: A roadside tavern that serves as a starting point and hub. Rumours of a missing merchant and a locked back room.

areas.name: Common Room
areas.at_a_glance: Low beams, tallow candles, the smell of old ale and wet wool. A handful of locals hunch over their cups. The fire smokes more than it warms.
details: Scratched into the table nearest the door: 'Do not ask about Aldric.'
The barkeep glances at the back door every few minutes.
One of the locals hasn't touched his drink in over an hour.
areas.threat_telltale: Conversation dies a half-beat too long when you walk in.

items.name: Torn note
items.description: Half a note stuffed under a candle: '...meet at the mill, bring the—'

npcs.name: Marta
npcs.description: Stout woman in her fifties, grey-streaked hair pulled back tight.
npcs.first_impression: The barkeep dries a cup that is already dry, not meeting your eyes.
npcs.telltale: A bruise, yellowish and old, peeks above her collar.

npcs.name: Unnamed local
npcs.description: Lean man, road-worn boots, cloak still on indoors.
npcs.first_impression: A man in the corner sits perfectly still, cloak on, watching the door.

areas.name: Back Room
areas.at_a_glance: A storeroom that smells of iron, not ale. Barrels pushed aside to make room for something. A dark stain on the floorboards.
details: The stain is blood, days old and scrubbed at but not gone.
Behind the largest barrel: a merchant's satchel, initials 'A.K.' burned into the leather.
Drag marks in the dust lead to a trapdoor beneath a loose board.
areas.threat_telltale: The air is close and wrong. Something happened here.

items.name: Merchant's satchel
items.description: Initials A.K. A few coins, a trade ledger, a sealed letter.

areas.name: Stable
areas.at_a_glance: Three stalls, two horses, one empty. Fresh hay but the horses are restless, ears back.
details: The empty stall has a saddle still hanging — expensive, with silver fittings.
Scratched into the stall post in fresh cuts: an arrow pointing toward the mill.
